hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】瑞穗表示 Circle 银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长和稳定币竞争风险；【FINANCE】SpaceX 首次公开募股和伊朗战争波动推动大型银行营收大幅增长；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)。

items.title: Mizuho says Circle bank approval doesn't solve USDC growth, stablecoin competition risks
items.summary: Japanese investment bank Mizuho reiterated its neutral rating on Circle, saying OCC approval for a national trust bank doesn't address slowing USDC growth or rising competition.
items.title_zh: 瑞穗表示 Circle 银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长和稳定币竞争风险
items.summary_zh: 日本投资银行瑞穗重申了对 Circle 的中性评级，称 OCC 对国家信托银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长放缓或竞争加剧的问题。

items.title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
items.summary: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股和伊朗战争波动推动大型银行营收大幅增长
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股、伊朗战争波动和商业贷款反弹推动华尔街的“最佳点”，大型银行将报告第二季度收入蓬勃发展。

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周四公布了专家名单，这些专家将组成五个工作组来检查该机构的运作。

items.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三发布了 6 月 16 日至 17 日会议纪要。

items.title: Lebanese Hold Fast to Their Land Despite Threat of Long Israeli Occupation
items.summary: Entire towns in southern Lebanon have been hollowed out by the war between Israel and Hezbollah. Some residents have stayed, fearing permanent displacement.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临以色列长期占领的威胁，黎巴嫩人仍坚守自己的土地
items.summary_zh: 以色列和真主党之间的战争使黎巴嫩南部的整个城镇被掏空。一些居民因担心永久流离失所而留下来。

items.title: Stablecoin FX priced below interbank rates in Q2, with routing now the biggest cost lever: Borderless
items.summary: Stablecoin payments were priced 3.2 bps below interbank FX rates across 260 corridors in Q2, per Borderless.xyz's benchmark.
items.title_zh: 第二季度稳定币外汇价格低于银行间利率，路由现在是最大的成本杠杆：无国界
items.summary_zh: 根据 Borderless.xyz 的基准，第二季度 260 个走廊的稳定币支付定价比银行间外汇汇率低 3.2 个基点。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Edge Toward War Again
items.summary: President Trump said the United States was renewing its blockade of shipping to and from Iran, after the two sides exchanged escalatory rhetoric and fresh attacks.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：美国和伊朗再次走向战争
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，在双方言辞升级和新的攻击之后，美国将重新封锁进出伊朗的航运。

items.title: Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear
items.summary: Analysts point to bitcoin’s resilience amid fresh U.S.-Iran escalation and renewed spot ETF inflows as the clearest signs yet that the marginal seller has stepped away.
items.title_zh: 随着卖家利润率消失，比特币恐慌性抛售可能会结束
items.summary_zh: 分析师指出，在美国与伊朗之间的紧张局势升级和现货 ETF 资金重新流入的情况下，比特币的韧性是迄今为止最明显的迹象，表明边际卖家已经退出。

items.title: Strategy pauses its Bitcoin buying spree to hoard a massive $3 billion cash cushion
items.summary: Strategy now has more than 20 months of coverage for preferred-stock dividends and debt interest.
items.title_zh: Strategy 暂停比特币购买热潮，以囤积 30 亿美元的巨额现金缓冲
items.summary_zh: Strategy 目前拥有超过 20 个月的优先股股息和债务利息保障。

items.title: UK Treasury report on tokenization cites Ripple as convergence model
items.summary: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.
items.title_zh: 英国财政部关于代币化的报告将瑞波币视为融合模型
items.summary_zh: 一份由财政部支持的报告目标是在两年内将回购协议、英国国债和基金放到链上，并对 Ripple 等公司一直在建立的无需许可的网络表示欢迎。

items.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy added $467 million in cash, made no changes to bitcoin holdings
items.summary: The company raised the fresh cash via sales of common stock; its USD Reserve now stands at $3 billion.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 的策略增加了 4.67 亿美元现金，但比特币持有量没有变化
items.summary_zh: 该公司通过出售普通股筹集新现金；其美元储备目前为 30 亿美元。

items.title: Strategy sells $467 million in MSTR shares, makes no bitcoin purchases as USD reserve hits $3 billion
items.summary: Strategy's total holdings remain at 843,775 BTC and account for around 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth roughly $53 billion.
items.title_zh: Strategy 出售价值 4.67 亿美元的 MSTR 股票，但由于美元储备达到 30 亿美元，因此不再购买比特币
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的总持有量仍为 843,775 枚 BTC，约占 2100 万枚比特币供应上限的 4%，价值约 530 亿美元。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
items.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
items.title_zh: 这些表现不佳的交易可能会在未来六个月内产生丰厚回报
items.summary_zh: ETF Action 的迈克·阿金斯 (Mike Akins) 鼓励投资者增加对那些与主要人工智能股票相比表现不佳的股票的投资。

items.title: At least 28 killed, 25 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
items.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.
items.title_zh: 曼谷酒吧起火 至少28人死亡25人重伤
items.summary_zh: 消防队员到达乍都乍地区的现场，发现顾客在火焰中逃生。

items.title: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
items.summary: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.title_zh: 部长表示，巴黎南部肆虐的野火可能是故意纵火的
items.summary_zh: 这是消防飞机首次从通常较为干燥和炎热的南部地区派出前往巴黎地区扑灭火灾。

items.title: Heavy rains and flash floods in Bangladesh leave 51 dead
items.summary: Thousands have lost their homes as flash floods and landslides have hit large parts of the country.
items.title_zh: 孟加拉国暴雨和山洪造成51人死亡
items.summary_zh: 由于山洪和山体滑坡袭击了该国大部分地区，数千人失去了家园。

items.title: Japan Builds Intelligence Agency It Hasn’t Had Since World War II
items.summary: Facing threats from Russia and China, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is turning to help from Western allies in forming a centralized agency.
items.title_zh: 日本建立二战以来从未有过的情报机构
items.summary_zh: 面对俄罗斯和中国的威胁，日本首相高市早苗正在寻求西方盟友的帮助，以组建一个中央机构。

items.title: The Next Phase in Ukraine’s War With Russia: The Battle for Minds
items.summary: Ukrainians, already drone innovators, are turning their focus to psychological operations aimed at undercutting Russian support for the war.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰与俄罗斯战争的下一阶段：思想之战
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰人已经是无人机创新者，他们正在将注意力转向旨在削弱俄罗斯对战争支持的心理行动。

items.title: A Robot Army Remakes Ground Warfare in Ukraine
items.summary: They began as supply mules. Now ground robots evacuate the wounded, hold trenches and even do the killing.
items.title_zh: 机器人军队重塑乌克兰地面战
items.summary_zh: 他们最初是作为补给骡子。现在，地面机器人可以疏散伤员、守卫战壕，甚至进行杀戮。

items.title: Hard-Liners in Iran Want to Keep Fighting America
items.summary: With much of their leadership killed in the war, Iran’s conservatives have sought to fill the void and intensify the fight against the United States.
items.title_zh: 伊朗强硬派希望继续与美国作战
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗的许多领导人在战争中丧生，伊朗保守派一直在寻求填补空白并加大对美国的打击力度。

items.title: Zelensky Announces Leadership Shuffle as War Turns in Ukraine’s Favor
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky said Ukraine’s prime minister, Yuliia Svyrydenko, would step down amid a broader shake-up in Ukraine’s senior leadership.
items.title_zh: 随着战争对乌克兰有利，泽连斯基宣布领导层洗牌
items.summary_zh: 总统弗拉基米尔·泽伦斯基表示，乌克兰总理尤利娅·斯维里登科将在乌克兰高级领导层更广泛的改组中辞职。

items.title: Bolivia weighs adding Tether's USDT to its national payments system
items.summary: Crypto usage has spiked in the country, with transaction volumes hitting $430 million in the year after the central bank removed restrictions in mid-2024.
items.title_zh: 玻利维亚考虑将 Tether 的 USDT 添加到其国家支付系统中
items.summary_zh: 该国的加密货币使用量激增，在央行于 2024 年中期取消限制后的一年内，交易量达到 4.3 亿美元。

items.title: Wall Street transfer agents lobby SEC, warning that third-party tokens pose risks to market integrity
items.summary: The Securities Transfer Association, an industry group for transfer agents, said company-authorized tokenization should receive preferential treatment under future rules.
items.title_zh: 华尔街转让代理游说 SEC，警告第三方代币对市场诚信构成风险
items.summary_zh: 转让代理行业组织证券转让协会表示，根据未来的规则，公司授权的代币化应获得优惠待遇。

items.title: Robinhood Chain surges into top five by DEX volume: Bernstein
items.summary: Robinhood's new blockchain quickly became a top-five network by DEX volume, signaling strong early demand for its tokenized asset platform, the broker said.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 表示 Robinhood Chain 按 DEX 交易量跻身前五
items.summary_zh: 该经纪人表示，Robinhood 的新区块链迅速成为 DEX 交易量排名前五的网络，这表明对其代币化资产平台的早期需求强劲。

items.title: Bank of Thailand audits high-volume stablecoin trades to crack down on illicit finance: report
items.summary: The central bank and the SEC have reportedly begun using data analytics tools to examine abnormal stablecoin trades, with a focus on USDT.
items.title_zh: 泰国央行审计大量稳定币交易以打击非法金融：报告
items.summary_zh: 据报道，央行和 SEC 已开始使用数据分析工具检查异常稳定币交易，重点关注 USDT。

items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
items.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 为同时交易多个市场的用户推出“Pro”产品永续期货
items.summary_zh: 根据 CNBC 提供的一份备忘录，该平台旨在缓解该公司最活跃的交易员遇到的问题。

items.title: Tom Lee's BitMine ether holdings rise to 5.77 million tokens, or 4.8% of total supply
items.summary: The company expanded its ETH treasury while Chairman Tom Lee pointed to Robinhood Chain's rapid growth on Ethereum.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 BitMine 以太币持有量增至 577 万枚，占总供应量的 4.8%
items.summary_zh: 该公司扩大了 ETH 资金库，董事长 Tom Lee 指出 Robinhood Chain 在以太坊上的快速增长。

items.title: Tom Lee says users ‘starting to see Ethereum as money’ as Bitmine adds 27,801 ETH
items.summary: Bitmine accumulates 5.77M ETH tokens, 4.8% of supply, as Tom Lee cites Robinhood Chain driving everyday user adoption.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 表示，随着 Bitmine 增加 27,801 ETH，用户“开始将以太坊视为货币”
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 积累了 577 万枚 ETH 代币，占供应量的 4.8%，Tom Lee 指出 Robinhood Chain 推动了日常用户的采用。

items.title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains: Bernstein
items.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.
items.title_zh: Robinhood Chain 每周 DEX 交易量超过 30 亿美元，跻身前五名：Bernstein
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 表示，自 7 月 1 日推出以来，随着 Layer 2 着眼于代币化市场，Robinhood Chain 的每周 DEX 交易量和 6.5 万用户达到了 3.1 亿美元。

items.title: Japan’s SBI Group to launch JPYSC stablecoin lending service this month
items.summary: The SBI's service would offer users a 3% annual yield for deposited JPYSC stablecoins, according to Nikkei.
items.title_zh: 日本 SBI 集团将于本月推出 JPYSC 稳定币借贷服务
items.summary_zh: 据《日经新闻》报道，SBI 的服务将为用户存入 JPYSC 稳定币提供 3% 的年收益率。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.title_zh: 我们与政府和国家安全伙伴关系的方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何处理政府和国家安全伙伴关系，以及负责任的人工智能使用、民主问责和公共安全的原则。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.title_zh: 在编码评估中将信号与噪声分离
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的一项新分析揭示了流行的编码基准 SWE-Bench Pro 中的问题，引发了人们对评估 AI 模型的可靠性和准确性的担忧。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
items.title_zh: GPT-Live 简介
items.summary_zh: 用于自然人机交互的新一代语音模型，现已为 ChatGPT 语音提供支持。

items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title_zh: Foundry 托管计算上的拥抱脸部模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.summary: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.
items.title_zh: 预测市场引发内幕交易担忧。以下是高盛和其他公司的回应
items.summary_zh: CNBC 联系了 50 家公司，了解他们在预测市场上的员工交易政策。少数人给出了答案。

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.summary: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商认为，随着美伊紧张局势升温，天然气价格将在更长时间内保持较高水平
items.summary_zh: 在该平台上，选举日汽油价格高于 3.50 美元的可能性已跃升至 75%。

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.summary: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Verizon、Lockheed Martin 赢得 700 亿美元资产管理交易
items.summary_zh: 高盛、贝莱德、罗素投资和美世等管理公司在数万亿美元的退休资产市场上的竞争非常激烈。

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 押注体育博彩公司 DraftKings 和 Flutter，认为预测市场受到监管限制
items.summary_zh: 该投资者认为，在新贵的竞争给体育博彩公司的股票带来压力之后，监管机构最终将打击预测市场。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 43%。

items.title: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
items.summary: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.
items.title_zh: “英雄、传奇、甜心”：向去世 78 岁的《侏罗纪公园》演员山姆·尼尔致敬
items.summary_zh: 尼尔的朋友、政客和电影明星都对他“突然而意外”的去世表示怀念。

items.title: Senator Lindsey Graham died of aortic tear, examiner says
items.summary: Graham, a close Republican ally of Donald Trump, died at the age of 71 on Saturday evening.
items.title_zh: 检查员称参议员林赛·格雷厄姆死于主动脉撕裂
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的亲密共和党盟友格雷厄姆于周六晚去世，享年 71 岁。

items.title: Men disguised as police kill Ecuadorean drug lord's brother
items.summary: The victim, David Macías, was the brother of drug lord 'El Fito', who is awaiting trial in the US.
items.title_zh: 伪装成警察的男子杀死了厄瓜多尔毒枭的兄弟
items.summary_zh: 受害者大卫·马西亚斯是毒枭“埃尔菲托”的兄弟，目前正在美国等待审判。

items.title: Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
items.summary: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".
items.title_zh: 因凡蒂诺为64队世界杯打开大门
items.summary_zh: 64支球队参加的男子世界杯计划将在2026年世界杯结束后进行详细评估，国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺表示，足球需要“为全世界服务”。

items.title: German court convicts Iraqi couple of enslaving Yazidi girls
items.summary: The pair, named only as Twana H.S. and Asia R. A., left Germany for Iraq in 2015 and became members of the Islamic State group.
items.title_zh: 德国法院判定伊拉克夫妇奴役雅兹迪女孩有罪
items.summary_zh: 两人的名字分别为 Twana H.S. Asia R. A. 于 2015 年离开德国前往伊拉克，并成为伊斯兰国组织的成员。

items.title: South Africa says more than 53,000 foreigners deported in migration campaign
items.summary: South Africa is cracking down on undocumented migrants following widespread anti-immigration protests.
items.title_zh: 南非称超过53,000名外国人在移民运动中被驱逐出境
items.summary_zh: 在广泛的反移民抗议活动之后，南非正在打击无证移民。

items.title: US Senator Mitch McConnell says absence due to fall and pneumonia
items.summary: The veteran Republican says he will not return to work "quite yet", in his first statement following weeks of speculation about his health.
items.title_zh: 美国参议员米奇·麦康奈尔因跌倒和肺炎缺席
items.summary_zh: 这位资深共和党人在数周对其健康状况进行猜测后的首次声明中表示，他“暂时”不会重返工作岗位。

items.title: The Netherlands Pushes to Make Manure a Hotter Product
items.summary: The Netherlands has been trying to figure out what to do with manure it can no longer use thanks to environmental rules. Volatile fertilizer costs may help.
items.title_zh: 荷兰推动粪便成为更热门的产品
items.summary_zh: 荷兰一直在试图弄清楚如何处理由于环境规则而无法再使用的粪便。化肥成本波动可能会有所帮助。

items.title: Residents of Spanish Towns Caught in Fierce Blazes Recount Harrowing Escapes
items.summary: Many say communication was chaotic and even nonexistent as flames tore through the area, taking 12 lives in one of the deadliest wildfires on record in Spain.
items.title_zh: 陷入大火的西班牙城镇居民讲述悲惨的逃生经历
items.summary_zh: 许多人表示，火势席卷整个地区，通讯十分混乱，甚至根本不存在，这是西班牙有记录以来最致命的野火之一，造成 12 人死亡。

items.title: How Trump Failed to Secure the Strait of Hormuz in His Iran Deal
items.summary: President Trump signed an agreement that Iran said gave it control of the waterway — and global energy supplies. Now, Iran’s military is violently asserting authority.
items.title_zh: 特朗普为何未能在伊朗协议中确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统签署了一项协议，伊朗称该协议使其控制了该水道以及全球能源供应。现在，伊朗军方正在暴力维护权威。

items.title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
items.summary: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 为代币化股票构建了区块链。 Memecoin 接管了
items.summary_zh: 自 7 月 1 日以来，Robinhood Chain 已吸引了 1.35 亿美元的价值和 80 万个地址。几乎没有一个地址在做该链的初衷。

items.title: President Trump, White House press Senate to advance the Clarity Act while ethics fight looms
items.summary: President Trump and other key administration officials and lawmakers are making a renewed push to pass cryptocurrency legislation into law.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统和白宫敦促参议院在道德斗争迫在眉睫的情况下推进《澄清法案》
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统和其他主要政府官员和立法者正在重新推动将加密货币立法纳入法律。

items.title: Chinese prosecutors call for more proactive approach to investigating crypto money laundering
items.summary: For the most part, China prohibits crypto trading and services while authorities actively investigate and prosecute crimes.
items.title_zh: 中国检察官呼吁采取更积极主动的方式调查加密货币洗钱活动
items.summary_zh: 在很大程度上，中国禁止加密货币交易和服务，而当局则积极调查和起诉犯罪行为。

items.title: Japan’s largest security token platform moves nearly $3 billion to Avalanche blockchain
items.summary: Progmat develops security token infrastructure that accounts for 64.6% of Japan’s security token market total issuance value.
items.title_zh: 日本最大的证券代币平台将近 30 亿美元转移到 Avalanche 区块链
items.summary_zh: Progmat 开发的证券型代币基础设施占日本证券型代币市场总发行额的 64.6%。

items.title: SBI Holdings, Solana Foundation partner to build Japan-based onchain financial market
items.summary: SBI and the Solana Foundation are collaborating to build an onchain financial market with SBI R3 rebranding to SBI Solana Global.
items.title_zh: SBI Holdings 与 Solana 基金会合作打造日本链上金融市场
items.summary_zh: SBI 和 Solana 基金会正在合作建立一个链上金融市场，SBI R3 更名为 SBI Solana Global。

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
items.title_zh: 德国电信如何利用人工智能重新布线电信
items.summary_zh: 德国电信如何通过 OpenAI 成为一家人工智能原生电信公司——改变客户服务、员工工作流程、网络运营和语音的未来。

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 入门
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT，开始您的第一次对话，并发现使用 AI 进行写作、集思广益和解决问题的简单方法。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金
items.summary_zh: 有关 OpenAI Bio 赏金计划的详细信息

items.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
items.summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6：前沿智能，随您的雄心壮志而扩展
items.summary_zh: 每个代币都提供更多的智能，每美元的性能更强，并且为您最艰苦的工作提供更多所需的功能。

items.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
items.summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 现在是您最雄心勃勃的工作的合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 是一个代理，可以跨您的应用程序和文件采取行动，如果需要，可以在项目上停留数小时，并将目标转化为完成的工作。

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
items.title_zh: 帮助 K-12 教育工作者培养实用的人工智能技能
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Academy 和 Walton Family Foundation 正在推出 AI 技能实践实践活动，帮助 K-12 教育工作者在课堂上培养实用的 AI 技能。

items.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title: Data for Agents
items.title_zh: 代理商数据

items.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.title: Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
items.title_zh: 在任何云上运行 AI 工作负载，存储在 Hugging Face 上：使用 SkyPilot 实现零出口存储

items.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
items.title_zh: 乐机器人v0.6.0：想象、评估、改进

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。
